title: UCNS — Unit Circle Number System
description: Unit Circle Number System: a recursive factorization engine over epicyclic objects on the doubled cover of the unit circle. Includes Theorem N as an explicitly FRONTIER catalogue-sufficient factorization target, the Carrier-LCM Law (DEFENDED + TEST-BACKED via the carrier-support-pruning substrate), and a Lean 4 core formalization whose remaining sorry obligations confer no defended status.
